calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 30, 2002.
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Douglas Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff, Hue My Dang, mother of minor, along with minor Stephen Mao
The Court grants the compromise as follows: Cost to be reimbursed $495.00; Attorneys fees $3001.25; Medical lien $ 725.00. For a net amount of $8,278.75 to be depositted into a blocked account until the minor's eighteenth birthday. Order signed in open court.
Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;
